content.en:
"Blood Transformation Realm Meeting?"

After Ye Tian received the summons from Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, he immediately went to Falcon Dragon City.

That was the place where the meeting would take place.

He didn't know what was going on, but it was certainly something big.

It didn't take long for him to arrive at Falcon Dragon City.

......

Hayabusa Dragon City, the interior of a magnificent building.

On the thrones sat one after another Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and Ye Tian was also sitting in them.

"So many blood transformation realms!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised, he usually didn't see a single Blood Transformation Realm, but there were already more than ten here, and there were also Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors coming one after another.

As time passed, the number of Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who finally arrived reached nineteen.

Nineteen Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, in addition to this, there are also three Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"These two ......"

Ye Tian's gaze was fixed on the two Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

These two definitely also hit the Heavenly Ancestor realm with the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level, and they integrated all the immeasurable divine powers into their whole body, and they were only one step away from the Blood Transformation Realm.

With the cultivation of the Boundary-Breaking Heavenly Ancestor, his combat power was definitely not inferior to that of an ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Because of this, they were also invited to participate in this meeting.

Ye Tian had never seen these two Heavenly Ancestors, and he hadn't heard much about them, so they should be very ancient Heavenly Ancestors.

"It's almost here, and the meeting can begin!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said.

Suddenly, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors looked at the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"Everyone, before that, I and the other six Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors went to the Territorial Sea Boundary Crack to clean up the debris of the Hidden Sea, but there was an accident, and we were all injured. The Fragment of the Dark Sea gave birth to a poisonous dragon of the Second Blood Transformation Realm, as well as six Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and there were even more other Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures. The Dark Sea Fragment is too close to Node 6 and could invade our Wanlong territorial waters at any time. "

"Eighteen years ago, they invaded once, and we paid a great price to find and kill all of these creatures. However, the creatures of the Dark Sea Fragments multiply too fast, and if one does not pay attention, a batch is born. Therefore, it is necessary to clean one piece regularly. "

"But now, our seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors can't clean it up at all, so we need your help. "

After the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor finished speaking, the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors all had solemn faces.

At this time, one of the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the True Phoenix Heavenly Ancestor, said: "Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, three trillion years ago, you only cleaned up the Dark Sea Fragments, it is normal for the Hidden Sea Fragments to give birth to the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but how could a Second Blood Transformation Heavenly Ancestor be born, this is too abnormal!"

"Perhaps the poisonous dragon left the fragments of the sea and got a chance elsewhere in the territorial seas. But now is not the time to discuss this issue, we must find a way to kill the creatures of the Dark Sea Fragments, and we can't let them continue to grow!"

"Yes, they must be destroyed, or we will have a hard time carrying them if we let them grow!"

Another Heavenly Ancestor agreed.

"Who wants to go?"

The Dragon's Tooth Celestial Ancestor looked around.

At this time, some Heavenly Ancestors hesitated, after all, going to the boundary crack of the territorial sea represents danger, although it is not deep, just to go to the nearby Nethersea fragments to clean up the Nethersea creatures, but there is still a crisis.

What's more, there was an unexpected situation this time, and no one knew what the outcome would be, maybe a few Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors would have to die!

If other Heavenly Ancestors solve it, then the remaining Heavenly Ancestors will naturally be happy!

As a result, some Heavenly Ancestors were silent, hoping that other Heavenly Ancestors would go.

"I'm willing to go!"

Dongao Tianzu Road.

"I'm willing to go!"

Another Heavenly Ancestor said.

One Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor after another expressed their attitude, and they were all willing to clean up the fragments of the Dark Sea.

"I'm willing to go!"

Ye Tian said.

In the end, the eleven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, plus Ye Tian, the Boundary-Breaking Heavenly Ancestor, that is, the twelve Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, were willing to go to the Hidden Sea Fragments.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor calculated that such a scale should be able to deal with the Nether Sea fragments, and at most they would only suffer some injuries.

So, he said: "The other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors are sitting in the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea, if those Blood Transformation Realm True Dragons in the True Dragon Realm Ruins come out to make trouble, it will depend on you!"

"Yes!"

Other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors responded.

After the discussion, the twelve Heavenly Ancestors prepared to go to the sixth node.

At this time, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor transmitted a part of the information to Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to have a better understanding of the fragments of the Hidden Sea.

In a few moments, they were at Node Six.

"Open!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor tore the No. 6 node with his hand, and a group of Heavenly Ancestors entered.

......

Territorial sea boundary seam.

The first time Ye Tian entered here, he immediately felt a terrifying impact that seemed to be about to wash away this place.

"Definitely!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor took out a bead and directly fixed the void, and many Heavenly Ancestors stabilized their bodies.

"The boundary gap of the territorial sea is like a river, the impact is very strong, once you enter here, you will be swept away by a force, just like ordinary creatures fall into a river and be washed away by water. If there is no Boundary Bead, it will be rushed to an unknown place, and it will be difficult to find the way back!"

He knew that Ye Tiancai had not been a Heavenly Ancestor for a long time, so he definitely didn't know much about the Realm Bead, so he explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tian also understood why the other Heavenly Ancestors didn't dare to enter the territorial sea boundary seam, even if the strength was enough, but without the territorial boundary beads, they couldn't go back if they came in.

"Let's go!"

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor moved through the gap in the territorial waters with the other eleven Heavenly Ancestors.

The oppression here is unprecedentedly great, and they can't perceive the distance, and in their perception, the distant void is like a darkness, and they can't see it.

The first time I entered here, I was really intimidating.

Ye Tian was very calm, after all, he was not afraid of losing his copy body.

The twelve Heavenly Ancestors moved slowly, very slowly, compared to the speed in the Wanlong territorial waters, such a speed was no different from standing still.

It took a long time to reach a destination not far away, the Fragments of the Dark Sea.

The fragments of the Hidden Sea are not too big, they are estimated to be about the size of the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and they emit a dark light in the cracks in the territorial waters, so they are also very easy to identify.

"If you enter the Dark Sea Fragment, you don't need the Boundary Bead!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

Airplanes!!!!

Many Heavenly Ancestors instantly shuttled into the fragments of the Dark Sea, and the impact disappeared, but a large number of Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures surged around.

"You still dare to come!"

Rumble!!!!

A huge poisonous dragon emerged from the void and stared coldly at the many Heavenly Ancestors.
